reference: I just noticed my two-year-old daughter has what I am guessing is a scab on the inside of one of her earring holes. I rubbed her earlobe and could feel a little ball on the inside. She has had her ears pierced since she was five months old. I haven't noticed any pus or redness either. I cleaned it with the piercing solution I was given and put the earring back on, but she wouldn't let me look at it long enough to see if the scab would easily come out. What should I do? Is this something I should be worried about?
text: I just noticed my two-year-old daughter has what I am guessing is a scab on the inside of one of her earring holes. I rubbed her earlobe and could feel a little ball on the inside. I cleaned it with the piercing solution I was given and put the earring back on, but she wouldn't let me look at it long enough to see if the scab would easily come out. What should I do? Is this something I should be worried about?
